name: Spinach and Strawberry Salad
directions: Wash and tear spinach into bite-sized pieces.
Combine dressing ingredients; mix well with hand blender.
Toss dressing with spinach and strawberries; serve and enjoy!

similar.name: Strawberry Spinach Salad With Sweet Mayo Dressing

name: Strawberry and Spinach Salad
directions: Put all dressing ingredients together in a smalll jar, shake well and set aside to let the flavors blend.
Lay spinach on a platter and mound berries in the middle.
Before serving, shake dressing and pour carefully over the salad.

name: Spinach/Strawberry Salad
directions: SALAD: Break off root ends and tough stems (if any) and discard.
Place spinach in a large bowl, add ice and cover with water; set aside to chill.
SUGARED ALMONDS: In a small saucepan, combine almonds, sugar and water.
Cook over medium-low heat for 5 to 7 minutes or until sugar is almost completely melted and nuts are golden, stirring occasionally- (there will be unmelted sugar on nuts).
Spread almonds on a large plate; let cool and then break into small pieces.
(Make ahead, as nuts can be stored in an air-tight container for about 3 days).
DRESSING: In a small bowl, whisk together balsamic vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, honey, poppy seeds and chives.
Drizzle in olive oil and whisk until blended.
Now whisk in Dijon mustard until well blended.
Whisk in salt and pepper to taste.
Remove spinach leaves from water, pat dry on paper towelling and break into pieces.
Add to a large mixing bowl.
Add sliced strawberries and toss lightly to mix.
Add dressing and toss gently until spinach and berries are lightly coated.
Add almonds, toss lightly and serve.
TIP: Packaged ready-to-use baby spinach can be found in the produce section of most supermarkets.
There are 8 cups of baby spinach in (one- 6 ounce) package.
NOTE:  Only make enough salad that will be eaten at this one time serving.  The salad will get somewhat soggy if kept for another day.

name: Romaine & Strawberry Salad
directions: Combine the lettuce, strawberries, onion, and toasted almond slivers; toss gently.
Combine honey and vinegar, stirring well.
Pour vinegar mixture over salad, and toss gently.

name: Strawberry Spinach Salad with Balsamic Vinaigrette
directions: Whisk together the sugar, sesame seeds, poppy seeds, sesame oil, dried onion, paprika, oil and vinegar.
Refrigerate until chilled.
In a salad bowl, toss spinach and strawberries with some of the dressing.
You will have more dressing than you will need.
Sprinkle with sliced almonds if desired.

similar.name: Spinach and Strawberry Salad with Honey Mustard Vinaigrette
Strawberry Spinach Salad With Creamy Raspberry Dressing
Strawberry Spinach Salad With Sweet Mayo Dressing
Spinach Salad With Strawberries and Pecans

name: Spinach and Strawberry Salad with Honey Mustard Vinaigrette
directions: Salad: Place spinach in a large bowl.
Add strawberries, sunflower seeds, and onions.
Pour dressing over salad;toss to combine.
Serve, garnished with enoki mushrooms, if desired.
Dressing: In a small bowl,whisk all ingredients together.

similar.name: Strawberry Spinach Salad with Balsamic Vinaigrette
Strawberry Spinach Salad With Sweet Mayo Dressing
Strawberry Spinach Salad With Creamy Raspberry Dressing

name: Spinach and Strawberry Salad
directions: Arrange the spinach on a large serving platter.
Scatter sliced strawberries over the spinach.
Top with onion slices.
In a bowl, stir together the vinegar, orange juice, honey and pepper.
This is your salad dressing.
Drizzle the dressing over the salad.
Serve immediately.
ENJOY!

name: Asparagus Strawberry Salad
directions: Shake together first 8 ingredients until sugar is dissolved.
Add oil.
Shake.
Cover and refrigerate at least one hour.
Blanch asparagus for 3- 5 minutes, drain, immediately rinsing with cold water to stop it from cooking further, refrigerate 1 hour.
Just before serving, combine strawberries, asparagus, dressing and sprinkle with blue cheese.

name: Spinach Salad With Raspberry Dressing
directions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, mustard, vinegar, pepper, garlic salt, dried basil, sugar, and salt until dressing is well combined.
In another large bowl, combine the spinach, mushrooms, strawberries, and red onion.
Add the dressing and toss well.

similar.name: Spinach and Arugula Salad With Strawberries
Strawberry Spinach Salad With Sweet Mayo Dressing
Strawberry Spinach Salad With Creamy Raspberry Dressing

name: Spinach, Asparagus, and Strawberry Salad
directions: To toast walnuts: place in baking pan and bake in a 350 degree oven until golden, about 10 minutes.
Pour 1 tablespoon olive oil into a 12- by 15-inch baking pan; Add asparagus, Sprinkle with salt, and mix to coat.
Spread in a single layer and bake in a 400 degree oven, stirring often, until tender when pierced, 15 to 20 minutes.
Let cool about 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, in a large bowl, mix vinegar and remaining 2 tablespoons oil.
Add spinach, strawberries, toasted walnuts, and cooled asparagus; Mix to coat.
Add more salt and pepper to taste.
Enjoy.

name: Strawberry Spinach Salad With Creamy Raspberry Dressing
directions: Heat oven to 375ºF.
Spread almonds on parchment paper on a baking sheet.
Sprinkle with sugar and spritz with water.
Toast almonds in oven until golden (about 10 minutes or so).
Remove and cool.
Toss together spinach, strawberries and onion.
Whisk together sugar, vinegar, olive oil, mayo, poppy seeds, salt and pepper.
Just before serving, drizzle salad with raspberry dressing and sprinkle with candied almonds.

similar.name: Strawberry Spinach Salad With Sweet Mayo Dressing
Spinach and Arugula Salad With Strawberries

name: Strawberry Melon Spinach Salad
directions: In a large salad serving bowl, toss together the spinach, strawberries, and cantaloupe. In a smaller mixing bowl, mix together the jam, vinegar, honey, and oil.
Drizzle dressing over salad; toss.
Sprinkle chopped nuts over the top.

name: Spinach and Strawberry  Salad
directions: Tear spinach leaves into bite size piese.
Combine spinach, strawberries and pecons; drizzle with poppy seed dressing. Serve immediately.

name: Spinach Salad With Strawberries and Pecans
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients.
Process next 7 ingredients in blender until smooth, stopping once to scrap down sides.
Stir in poppy seeds.

similar.name: Strawberry Spinach Salad With Sweet Mayo Dressing
Spinach and Arugula Salad With Strawberries

name: Strawberry Romaine Salad
directions: Tear romaine lettuce into bite size pieces. Peel and slice cucumber. Slice onions and strawberries into small pieces.  Gently toss all ingredients together.
Pour dressing ingredients into a sealable container and shake to mix. Put dressing over salad just before serving. Enjoy!

name: Strawberry Asparagus Salad
directions: Toss the asparagus and strawberries together in a bowl.
Set aside.
In a small bowl, combine the dressing ingredients and mix well.
Pour dressing over salad and toss.
Chill before serving.

name: Strawberry Salad
directions: Mix dressing.
Tear washed greens into bite sized pieces. Place in salad bowl.
Toss with dressing.
Add strawberries, onion and if you desire add the grapes and mandarin oranges.
Toss lightly. Top with nuts, and sprinkle with seeds and pretzels if you wish.

name: Strawberry Nut Salad
directions: TOSS almonds with sugar in nonstick skillet; cook on medium heat until sugar is caramelized, stirring constantly. Spread into single layer on greased baking sheet or sheet of wax paper; cool. Break into small pieces.
TOSS spinach, Boston lettuce and strawberries in large bowl.
DRIZZLE with dressing just before serving; toss lightly. Sprinkle with almonds. Serve on chilled plates.

name: Strawberry Spinach Salad
directions: For dressing, juice and zest lemon.  Add remaining dressing ingredients and mix well with whisk.
Place salad ingredients into Large Bowl.  Toss slightly.
Pour dressing over salad.  Slightly toss again.

name: Strawberry Spinach Salad With Sweet Mayo Dressing
directions: Toss spinach, strawberries and onion together.
Mix remaining ingredients together. Start with only 3 Tbsp sugar and taste. You may not want the entire amount of sugar.
You may also not need the entire amount of dressing. Unused dressing will keep in the refrigerator for a few days.

similar.name: Strawberry Spinach Salad With Creamy Raspberry Dressing
Spinach Salad With Strawberries and Pecans

name: Strawberry Spinach Salad
directions: Dressing: Zest lemon to measure ½ teaspoon zest. Juice the lemon to measure 2 tablespoons of juice. Combine zest, juice, vinegar, sugar, oil and poppy seeds in small bowl. Whisk until well blended. Cover; refrigerate until ready to use.
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Salad: Spread almonds in single layer over bottom of small pan. Bake 10-12 minutes or until lightly toasted. Remove from oven; cool almonds in pan.

Meanwhile, hull strawberries; cut strawberries into quarters. Score cucumber lengthwise; remove seeds. Slice cucumber; cut slices in half. Slice onion into thin wedges. Place spinach in large serving bowl; add strawberries; cucumber and onion. Whisk dressing; pour over salad, gently tossing to coat. Sprinkle with almonds. Serve immediately.

name: Strawberry Spinach Salad
directions: Mix all Ingredients together in a salad bowl.
You may add more strawberries and advocados if you like. Onions are optional.

name: Spinach Salad With Strawberries
directions: Make spiced pecans: Beat egg white until very frothy, but not stiff.
Add remaining ingredients, excluding pecans. Now add pecans and mix to coat.
Spread pecans on baking sheet in single layer and bake in a preheated 200 degree oven for 45 minutes, turning every 15 minutes.
Let cool completely.
For dressing, shake together all ingredients.
Toss together salad ingredients.
Toss dressing with salad just before serving (or leave salad dry and serve the dressing on the side), sprinkle dressed salad with pecans.

similar.name: Strawberry Spinach Salad With Creamy Raspberry Dressing
Spinach Salad With Strawberries and Pecans
Strawberry Spinach Salad With Sweet Mayo Dressing

name: Spinach, Orange & Strawberry Salad
directions: To prepare dressing, place salt, pepper, mustard and a few drops of oil into a bowl and whisk until smooth.
Gradully add vinegar, oil, and orange concentrating - whisk until smooth.
Put all salad ingredients in salad bowl and toss with dressing.
Serve with blue cheese sprinkles.

similar.name: Strawberry Spinach Salad With Creamy Raspberry Dressing
Strawberry Spinach Salad With Sweet Mayo Dressing
Spinach Salad With Strawberries and Pecans

name: Spinach, Strawberry and Feta Salad
directions: Beat lemon juice, oil, honey and pepper with wire whisk until well blended.
Toss remaining ingredients in large bowl.
Drizzle with dressing just before serving; toss to coat.

name: Strawberry-Onion Salad With Creamy Poppy Seed Dressing
directions: In a small bowl whisk together all dressing ingredients until well blended.
Divide the red lettuce between 4-6 plates or bowls.
Divide the strawberry slices over lettuce then garnish with onion slices.
Pour the dressing over salads just before serving.

similar.name: Strawberry Spinach Salad With Sweet Mayo Dressing

name: Berry Coleslaw
directions: In a large bowl, combine the vinegar, apple juice, sugar, salt and pepper; add the cabbage. Toss gently to coat.
Cover and refrigerate 8 hours or overnight, stirring occasionally.
Just before serving, stir in strawberries and cranberries.

name: Cucumber Strawberry Salad
directions: Mix the lime juice and green pepper.
Combine the cucumbers and strawberries in a serving bowl.
Drizzle the lime juice and peppers in the bowl.
Toss all ingredients to combine.
Chill before serving.

name: Strawberry, Mushroom, and Spinach Salad
directions: Combine and toss all ingredients together.
Enjoy!
Feel free to add bacon and/or feta cheese, if you like.

name: A Different Spinach Salad
directions: Divide the spinach among four salad plates.  Top with sliced bananas, strawberries and walnuts.  Serve with dressing, to taste.

name: Strawberry Avocado Salad
directions: In a small bowl, combine dressing ingredients. Whisk together until well blended. Set aside.
Place salad greens in a bowl. Arrange avocado and strawberry slices on top of greens. Drizzle dressing over salad and top with pecans.
Serve immediately or refrigerate up to 2 hours.

name: Spinach and Arugula Salad With Strawberries
directions: Make the vinaigrette first:  Add the red wine vinegar, balsamic vinegar and salt to a salad bowl, the gradually add the oil while whishing until emulsified.
Add the spinach and arugula to the vinaigrette and toss gently.
When the greens are lightly coated, transfer to salad plates, top with the strawberries and finish with a generous grinding of pepper.

similar.name: Strawberry Spinach Salad With Creamy Raspberry Dressing
Strawberry Spinach Salad With Sweet Mayo Dressing

name: Strawberry Spinach Pecan Salad
directions: Combine first 7 ingredients at least 1 hour in advance and shake well. Simmer pecans in butter with a little sprinkle of sugar until soft. Tear spinach leaves into bite size pieces. Slice strawberries lengthwise. Add salad dressing just before serving and toss well. The dressing is a large recipe.

similar.name: Strawberry Spinach Salad With Sweet Mayo Dressing

name: Tomato Strawberry Salsa
directions: Place all ingredients in a large bowl and toss to mix well.
Cover and chill at least 2 hours before serving.

name: Spinach and Strawberry Salad
directions: Slice green onions and strawberries. Put spinach in a large bowl and toss lightly with all ingredients. Use dressing sparingly as it's very sweet.

name: Special Strawberry Spinach Salad
directions: In a large bowl, combine the spinach, strawberries and almonds.
Place dressing ingredients in a blender;
cover and process until combined.
Pour over salad and toss to coat.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Strawberry-Onion Salad With Creamy Poppy Seed Dressing

name: Spinach and Strawberry Salad
directions: Wash and trim the spinach leaves.  (I like to remove the stems).
Wash and remove the tops of the strawberries.  Slice lengthwise into about 1/8 inch slices so that the slices look like "hearts".
Thinly slice the red onion so that you have "round shavings".
Toss the spinach leaves, 1/2 the strawberry slices, 1/2 the pecans and 1/4 cup of feta with 1/2 of the salad dressing.
Arrange in a bowl or on a serving dish.
On top, layer the remaining strawberry slices and onions.
Drizzle with a little more dressing.
Sprinkle the remaining pecans and feta on the salad and drizzle with a bit more dressing for color.
Garnish with several whole strawberries (I like to slice partway through the whole berry, leaving the green leaves, and "fan" the slice out to make an attractive garnish).
Serve immediately.  Note: this salad will not keep long.  The vinegar in the dressing will wilt the leaves and "melt" the cheese after a few hours).
